name: efcore-repository
title: EF Core Repository Pattern
description: Simple EF Core repository with asynchronous read/write operations.
bestPractices: Pass CancellationToken through all async database calls
Use primary constructor injection for cleaner, concise syntax
Keep repositories focused on a single aggregate root
pitfalls: Avoid exposing IQueryable from the repository — return concrete types to prevent leaky abstractions
Calling SaveChangesAsync inside every method prevents batching; consider a Unit of Work pattern
